name: Andrii Struk
technologies: Technologies: React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Telegram WebApp SDK
technologies_1: Basic knowledge of Node.js and MongoDB
technologies_2: Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, SQL
summary_text: Hi, my name is Andrii. I'm finishing my studies in Programming at Vistula University. One of my main projects was building a Telegram Mini App — a single-page application (SPA) built with React, which was successfully launched but, due to certain circumstances, ended up in someone else's hands. Two people worked on it, and the entire app was built in 1.5 months from scratch, despite having little to no prior knowledge of the technologies involved. I was responsible for the frontend: React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The project included full navigation, user interfaces, and backend integration. My friend and I lived and worked together, so even though my focus was on the frontend, I was also partially involved in backend work — I understood how the server logic, database, and connected services functioned. My strengths include a strong work ethic, perseverance, and a genuine drive for continuous growth. I'm not afraid of new challenges — I actually enjoy diving into things I don't yet know. I'm ready to take on any task and see it through. While I don't yet have commercial experience, I'm happy to start on modest terms to prove that I can learn quickly and deliver quality results under tight deadlines.
school_education: General education with a focus on mathematics and computer science basics.
zespol: College of Electronics (Zespół Szkół Elektronicznych im. Tadeusza Kościuszki), Opole
vistula: Vistula University (Akademia Finansów i Biznesu Vistula), Warsaw
project_card_1_desc: A full-featured online clothing store built as a university project. Includes a product catalog, shopping cart, and a MySQL database for managing inventory and orders. Developed from scratch with server-side PHP logic and a relational data structure.
project_card_2_desc: A single-page React application running inside Telegram. Built from scratch in 1.5 months together with a friend — full navigation, UI, and backend integration. Owned the entire frontend; gained hands-on understanding of server logic and MongoDB through close collaboration.
